title: create_space bumps Space state_seq on INSERT OR IGNORE no-op
description: Daemon startup calls create_space() for the default space on every boot. When the space already exists the INSERT OR IGNORE is a no-op, but bump_state_seq('Space') is called unconditionally. Every restart therefore increments the Space state token with no real data change, causing every connected JMAP client to perform a redundant re-sync on reconnect. Same pattern as tracked nie-14sh.44 (create_channel) but in a different function that is called on every daemon start.
